name: TinyUSB
description: The `tinyusb` component implements a foundation for USB device functionality. It is currently supported on the following ESP32 microcontroller variants:

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: Manually specify the ID for this component.

config_entries.label: USB Lang ID
config_entries.description: USB language identifier. Defaults to `0x0409` (English - United States).

config_entries.label: USB Product Str
config_entries.description: Product name string descriptor. Defaults to `"ESPHome"`.

config_entries.label: USB Serial Str
config_entries.description: Serial number string descriptor. If not specified, the device's MAC address will be used.

config_entries.label: USB Vendor ID
config_entries.description: USB vendor identifier. Defaults to `0x303A` (Espressif Systems).
